paths.name: Full Curriculum — All 10 Modules
paths.description: The complete dependency-ordered sequence from interview meta-strategy through algorithms, complexity, and language traps.

paths.name: Fast Track — Core Patterns Only
paths.description: Concentrates on the highest ROI pattern modules. Recommended for a 4-week sprint before an upcoming interview.

paths.name: Complexity Deep Dive
paths.description: The three complexity analysis modules for candidates who need to strengthen their theoretical vocabulary.

paths.name: Language Hardening Sprint
paths.description: Focus on hidden-cost traps in Python, Java, and JavaScript. Suitable as a standalone review for experienced engineers.

paths.name: Advanced Patterns — DP, Backtracking, DSU
paths.description: The three hardest algorithmic categories. Requires completion of fast-track-patterns and complexity-deep-dive first.
